title: Fuzzy dedup on input text
acceptance_criteria: Jaccard similarity on bigram shingles > 0.85 → pair deduped
completion_summary: Filter() tokenizes input text into words, builds bigram shingle sets, computes Jaccard similarity. Greedy first-occurrence algorithm preserves earliest near-duplicate. 8 tests pass: empty, single, identical, different, near-dup, chain dedup, custom threshold, default.
